div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Costa Rica (Sack)
div.p:
35. Please inquire of the Costa Rican Government whether it is prepared to initiate at an early date exploratory conversations looking to the negotiation of a commercial agreement. Since this Government is planning to give public notice shortly of the intention to negotiate agreements with other Central American countries it seems
appropriate to inquire as a matter of courtesy whether the Costa Rican Government desires a similar announcement to be made with respect to that country.
